text_col.text_content: {"text":"What is the discount percentage for each month?","type":"text","content":{"text":"What is the discount percentage for each month?"}}

{"text":"The discount percentage varies across the months from January 2014 to December 2016. The highest discount percentage is **8.1%** in December 2015, while the lowest is **0.0%**, occurring in several months such as January 2014. Notable months with higher discounts include November and December of each year, with percentages generally above 7%. Months like April and July also show moderate discounts around 5-6%. The discount percentage is consistently **0.0%** in the first quarter of each year.","interpretationStash":{"approach":"sql","userQuestion":"What is the discount percentage for each
